notes.heading: No false online state
notes.body: The app no longer counts Dragonwilds Server Control itself as the dedicated server after a reboot.

notes.heading: Smarter process matching
notes.body: Known Dragonwilds server processes are still detected, while broader matches now need to come from the configured server folder.

notes.heading: Regression coverage
notes.body: Smoke tests now cover the control-app false positive and the expected Dragonwilds server process cases.
